text: The system shall support an administrator level.
The administrator shall have the ability to create user groups.
The administrator shall have the ability to create project managers, analysts, and guests.
The administrator shall have the ability to reset user passwords.
The administrator shall have the ability to disable access for old project managers, analysts, and guests while preserving their entered information.
The system shall support a project manager level.
The project manager shall have the ability to insert a new privacy policy to the repository.
The project manager shall have the ability to delete a privacy policy from the repository.
The project manager shall have the ability to create a new domain of privacy policies.
The project manager shall have the ability to assign analysts to user groups.
The project manager shall have the ability to assign user groups and individual analysts to projects.
The project manager shall set restrictions on access to information for guests.
The project manager shall have the ability to export data from a project to an XML file.
The project manager shall have the ability to save the current version of the repository for evolution analysis.
The system shall support an analyst level.
The analyst shall have the ability to select assigned privacy policies.
The analyst shall have the ability to add, delete, and update goals.
The analyst shall have the ability to add, delete, and update scenarios.
The analyst shall have the ability to view goal and scenario details including ID, description, and source.
The analyst shall have the ability to update personal profile information.
The analyst shall have the ability to add, delete, and update requirements.
The analyst shall have the ability to add, delete, and update access control policies.
The analyst shall have the ability to view access control policies.
The system shall support a guest level.
The guest shall have the ability to view repository information subject to project manager restrictions.
The system shall allow all users to have different access levels to projects.
The system shall provide secure storage of passwords in the database.
The system shall provide a secure method for users to log onto the system.
The system shall allow analysts to add a new goal.
The system shall provide templates for goals, scenarios, P3P statements, EPAL rules, and access control policies.
The system shall allow multiple subject classifications for each goal.
The system shall provide the ability to dynamically add a new classification type of goals.
The system shall provide the ability to update an existing goal.
The system shall provide the ability to delete a goal.
The system shall automatically propagate associated policy information upon deletion or replacement of a goal.
The system shall maintain traceability links between a goal and its source policy.
The system shall display the number of occurrences of a goal in policies and domains.
The system shall display the context of a goal as the original statement from the policy.
The system shall allow analysts to create and update goal keyword definitions.
The system shall provide the ability to lock and unlock keyword definitions.
The system shall allow users to search goals according to chosen attributes.
The system shall provide a template to express goals in BNF grammar.
The system shall support conflict identification and resolution between requirements and privacy policies.
The system shall allow project managers to add analysis documents and assign domains.
The system shall support automatic multi-user analysis results comparison.
The system shall calculate the Flesch Readability Score and Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level for textual documents.
The system shall provide the ability to add, edit, and delete scenarios within a project.
The system shall allow analysts to reuse existing scenarios.
The system shall allow analysts to specify requirements.
The system shall allow analysts to add new objects including names and types for RACAF.
The system shall support association of privacy preferences with objects.
The system shall allow analysts to specify data hierarchies.
The system shall allow graphical view of data structures.
The system shall support the definition of roles and actor relationships.
The system shall support role delegation from project managers to analysts.
The system shall allow analysts to invoke the Ponder policy editor.
The system shall generate an access log for every add, delete, and edit action.
